title: eumecanthus subpeltatus
intro: Eumecanthus subpeltatus, also known as the "Chinese angelica tree," is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eumecanthus subpeltatus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
